mapper.select: # CASE WHEN：当 create_date 为今天且 status 小于 3（即一天内未付款或关闭的订单），则返回 1，否则返回 NULL，再通过 COUNT 统计 1 的数量（COUNT 只统计非 NULL），下面同理 # AND 后面的条件可以提前过滤掉 “完全不相关的记录”，然后再进行统计，减少参与聚合计算的数据量 SELECT (COUNT( CASE WHEN create_date = CURDATE() AND status < 3 THEN 1 END) >= 10 OR COUNT(CASE WHEN refund_date = CURDATE() AND status = 4 THEN 1 END) >= 5 ) AS illegal FROM tb_order WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND ( (create_date = CURDATE() AND status < 3) OR (refund_date = CURDATE() AND status = 4) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_order ( customer_id, goods_id, snapshot_id, address_id, out_trade_no, goods_title, goods_price, number, goods_description, status, total_amount, discount_amount, payable_amount, goods_image, create_date ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{goodsId}, #{snapshotId}, #{addressId}, #{outTradeNo}, #{goodsTitle}, #{goodsPrice}, #{number}, #{goodsDescription}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{payableAmount}, #{goodsImage}, CURDATE() )
mapper.select: select payable_amount from tb_order where out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo}
select id, customer_id, goods_title, out_trade_no, payable_amount, payment_type, status, create_time from tb_order where out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo} and status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_order SET status = 2 WHERE status = 1 AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(payable_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(number) AS number FROM tb_order WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND `status` IN (3, 5, 6)

SELECT o.id, o.number AS goodsCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a2.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS appointmentFinishedCount FROM tb_appointment a1 INNER JOIN tb_order o ON o.id = a1.order_id INNER JOIN tb_appointment a2 ON a2.order_id = o.id AND a2.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a1.uuid = #{uuid} GROUP BY o.id, o.number;
